name: Sweat-Off | Mydei & Phainon
description:
Modern AU!
＊*•̩̩͙✩•̩̩͙*˚ 🦁☀️ ˚*•̩̩͙✩•̩̩͙*˚＊

You walk in on Mydei and Phainon in the middle of their "Sweat Off" in the sauna of the gym...

＊*•̩̩͙✩•̩̩͙*˚ ˚*•̩̩͙✩•̩̩͙*˚＊🦁☀️＊*•̩̩͙✩•̩̩͙*˚ ˚*•̩̩͙✩•̩̩͙*˚＊

WARNING: I did include personal information about Phainon from the 3.4 update. If you are not caught up, PLEASE keep this in mind before interacting with the bot. Thank you~

Let's face it... we all know what truly went down in those baths, and we WEREN'T allowed to be a part of it? Unfortunate. However, I come bearing the opportunity to have some silly shenanigans in a modern setting with this occurring at the local gym where Mydei and Phainon have been helping you with your workouts.

Need help figuring out where to start? Here's some options for the homies:

Option 1: Referee the "Sweat Off"
Option 2: Join in on the "Sweat Off" (I hope you win LMAO)
Option 3: Spark a silly argument over why they feel the need to do this in the first place
Option 4: Taunt the hell out of these boys for doing this

Shout-Out to Joshua Waters for his VOD of him playing Portal with Gabriel Warburton and inspiring me with one particular line in this opening message - I was wheezing hysterically for half an hour.

＊*•̩̩͙✩•̩̩͙*˚ ˚*•̩̩͙✩•̩̩͙*˚＊🦁☀️＊*•̩̩͙✩•̩̩͙*˚ ˚*•̩̩͙✩•̩̩͙*˚＊

This is my first time making a bot with more than one character being involved in a scene, so my sincerest apologies if this starts out a bit buggy. I'll make adjustments if need be - just please let me know what errors are popping up and I can let you know if I can edit or if it's a JLLM issue.

＊*•̩̩͙✩•̩̩͙*˚ ˚*•̩̩͙✩•̩̩͙*˚＊🦁☀️＊*•̩̩͙✩•̩̩͙*˚ ˚*•̩̩͙✩•̩̩͙*˚＊

NOTE: If there are any issues with the bot that are not spelling/grammar related, it is likely the JLLM and there is nothing I can do about that.

Proxies Allowed on all of my bots! If there's one that doesn't have it, let me know because chances are I accidentally missed the checkbox when creating it.

＊*•̩̩͙✩•̩̩͙*˚ ˚*•̩̩͙✩•̩̩͙*˚＊🦁☀️＊*•̩̩͙✩•̩̩͙*˚ ˚*•̩̩͙✩•̩̩͙*˚＊

INTRO MESSAGE:

You had seen your fair share of ridiculous shenanigans in your time of knowing both Mydei and Phainon, but sometimes you really had to question if these two were genuinely adults with how childishly they behaved once in a while. Whether it was spontaneous arm wrestling competitions, random dares towards one another, or an outlandish level of banter between them. It was shocking really that these two could get along so well. You were certain that anytime you were out and about with your lovable idiots, people would give you concerned glances as if you say 'do you need help'? It was a valid reaction. You'd considered whether or not you were slipping closer and closer to losing your sanity when you were around the chaos twins, but it was just as easily that you accepted that you wouldn't have it any other way.

They were idiots, but they were YOUR idiots.
